features: Conforms to all current EC directives for food use
Foil refill for the easycut dispenser
description: Product Description Highly respected and trusted by our consumers, BacoFoil is available in a number of formats depending on your cooking and convenience needs.Established in 1962, Baco is the UK's leading brand covering a range of products in food preparation, storage and waste management—all high-quality products that aim to solve your everyday problems around the home. And being owned by Wrap Film Systems, the leading cling film and foil supplier to the catering and hospitality industries, means we can also offer you, our trusty consumer, a newly expanded range of products. Directions To re-fill dispenser, twist plastic tab and pull out gently. Remove empty roll. Place on a flat surface insert refill and re-insert plug in dispenser. Open lid and pull back flap. Take end of foil and pull through. For best results pull foil straight up vertically Safety Warning To avoid the danger of choking keep this product away from babies and small children. Always consult your microwave manufacturer's instructions before using in a microwave oven. Legal Disclaimer Bacofoil Easycut Kitchen Foil Refill. Securely keep all of your food fresh using this Easycut Kitchen Foil from Bacofoil. Pop into your Easycut Foil Dispenser when you've run out! See more
